name: Avocado Nice Cream
intro: Avocados, full of healthy fats, make the perfect base for nice cream. Their taste is pretty neutral, but their fat enhances the flavors of other ingredients. Black currants are acidic and characteristically Swedish, and have anti-inflammatory properties.
method: In a blender, mix the avocado, frozen berries, and syrup to a smooth nice cream. Serve in bowls topped with frozen black currants and bee pollen, and some extra syrup if you want more sweetener.
